name: Pyla Gambrel Garage Plan Option 3- 24x24 Barn-Style Two-Car Garage with Loft Potential | DIY Workshop & Storage Building Plans
open_features: Classic barn-style architecture with a high-capacity roof profile that dramatically increases interior space and vertical storage.
The 24x24 footprint provides ample room for two vehicles, ATVs, lawn equipment, tool storage, and dedicated workshop areas.
The gambrel roof naturally creates overhead space ideal for a large storage loft, seasonal storage, or an elevated workspace.
Straightforward framing methods and efficient dimensions make Pyla a practical build for experienced DIY builders or contractors.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Pyla Gambrel Garage Option 3- a spacious 24x24 barn-style garage and workshop building designed for efficiency, durability, and timeless architectural appeal. Featuring the iconic gambrel roof profile, Pyla maximizes interior headroom while delivering the classic charm of a traditional barn-inspired structure.
